Paragraph

For any multi-index \(\alpha=(\alpha_{1},\ldots, \alpha_{n})\) we denote \(|\alpha| :=\alpha_{1}+\ldots+\alpha_{n}\text{.}\) Note that
\begin{equation*} \Vert f\Vert_{C^{k}(\bar D)}:=\sum_{j=0}^{k}\sum_{|\alpha|=j}\max_{\bx \in \bar D}|D_{\alpha}u(\bx)| \end{equation*}
defines a norm on \(C^{k}(\bar D)\) and makes the latter a complete metric space.
in-context
